author: Dustin Keeton
description: Automatically elaborate, transcribe, enrich, summarize, organize, and connect your notes with AI. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* chore: idempotency foundation spike (#390) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/399
* docs: add command-pipeline Mermaid diagram (#388) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/400
* fix: gate Review button on per-action auto-accept setting (#366) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/401
* refactor: centralize title module's Review-button gating (#402) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/403
* feat: proposal idempotency — dedup by content key + enforce maxProposalsPerNote by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/404
* feat: notice throttle/dedup + centralize ad-hoc new Notice sites by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/405
* feat: AI-request idempotency — in-flight coalescing + opt-in response cache by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/406
* feat: prompt-injection gating for fetched external content (proposer boundary) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/407
* fix: pre-check title-proposal path collisions, offer suffix or merge by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/409
* docs: explain why subscription plans can't replace API billing by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/410
* chore: add Obsidian eslint gate + document the automatic release flow by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/411
* feat: add version-stamped settings migration framework by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/413
* feat: surface title-proposal filename collisions as a distinct UI state by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/415
* chore: codebase audit — redactError sink hardening + docs reground by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/417
* chore: release 1.0.8 by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/419


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/compare/1.0.7...1.0.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: summarize note content and add combined/per-item summary mode by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/368

* fix: allow & and URL-legal characters in sanitizeUrl (defense-in-depth) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/372
* fix: handle TikTok slideshow/no-audio and ffmpeg-location in yt-dlp extraction by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/373
* fix: fetch Reddit/general link content for Elaborate and surface fetch failures by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/374
* feat: video-dependency onboarding — notice button + path tooltips by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/383
* feat: auto-fold Properties toggle in a new General section by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/384
* feat: notify users when a new Synapse version is available by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/385
* feat: in-app changelog view in settings by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/386
* feat: use note title as an elaboration signal by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/391
* feat: make REM inference always-on and down-weight title matches by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/392
* chore: codebase audit — redaction fix, command casing, docs refresh by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/393
* chore: release 1.0.7 by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/394

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.27.4 to 0.28.1 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/306
* fix(ci): keep package-lock cross-platform-complete (pin @emnapi top-level deps) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/312
* ci: add build provenance attestations for release assets by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/309
* fix: use window-scoped timer and DOM APIs for popout compatibility by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/310
* chore: remove dead code and unnecessary regex escapes by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/311
* refactor: inject node deps into duration-detector for testability (#271) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/313
* fix: handle unhandled promise rejections in main.ts + add fireAndForget helper (#297) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/314
* fix: handle promise rejections in unified-proposal-view click handlers (#297) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/315
* fix: handle promise rejections in module index files + duration-detector reject (#297) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/316
* chore: enforce promise-handling rules via type-aware ESLint in CI (#297) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/317
* refactor: add json-utils + frontmatter-tag helpers and apply to stores (#296) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/318
* refactor: type AI/provider responses with validated guards (#296) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/319
* refactor: type yt-dlp/ffprobe + oEmbed + JSON-LD external data (#296) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/320
* refactor: clean up assertions/types and enforce type-safety ESLint rules in CI (#296) by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/322
* refactor: centralize desktop-only Node access behind a guarded loader by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/324
* fix: adopt Obsidian API & CSS best practices from review by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/325
* chore: bump version to 1.0.2 by @dustinkeeton in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/326

## New Contributors
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/pull/306

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dustinkeeton/obsidian-synapse/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2
